description: Create a tabbed project overview page for a CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing study in TiddlyWiki using the tabs macro. The project documentation must consist of five tiddlers. Create 'CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol' tagged 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs' with a 'caption' field of 'Protocol' and body text detailing a protocol for sgRNA targeting TP53, Cas9 ribonucleoprotein (RNP) complex, electroporation, and clone screening. Create 'CRISPR-Cas9 Equipment' tagged 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs' with a 'caption' field of 'Equipment' and a table listing Cas9 protein (catalog 1081058), Lonza Nucleofector, and SF Cell Line Kit. Create 'CRISPR-Cas9 Results' tagged 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs' with a 'caption' field of 'Results' and text documenting 73% editing efficiency, ICE analysis, and off-target analysis. Create 'CRISPR-Cas9 References' tagged 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs' with a 'caption' field of 'References' and DOIs 10.1126/science.1258096 and 10.1038/nprot.2013.143. Finally, create a master tiddler named 'CRISPR-Cas9 Project Overview' that uses the tabs macro to display all tiddlers with the 'CRISPR-Cas9 Tabs' tag, setting 'CRISPR-Cas9 Protocol' as the default tab.
